scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n web,server -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w apps/server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/server
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/web && npm run lint -w apps/server
scripts.format: npm run format -w apps/web && npm run format -w apps/server
